steps: Go to https://app.intercom.com/ and log in to your Intercom account
Click your avatar in the bottom-left corner and go to 'Settings'
Click 'New app', enter a name for your app, and click 'Create app'
In your app's settings, navigate to 'Authentication'
Click 'Edit' and check 'Use OAuth' to enable OAuth
Add your redirect URL(s) under 'Redirect URLs'
Go to 'Basic Information' to find your Client ID and Client Secret

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: Found in your app's Basic Information page in the Developer Hub

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: Found in your app's Basic Information page in the Developer Hub

notes: A paid Intercom plan is required to use the API
OAuth apps can be 'Internal' (single workspace) or 'Public' (any workspace)
For internal integrations, you can also use a simple Access Token instead of OAuth
Rate limits vary by plan; check https://developers.intercom.com/docs/build-an-integration/learn-more/rate-limiting
